title: viola × eliasii
intro: Viola × eliasii, also known as the Elias' violet or hybrid violet, is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Viola. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Viola × eliasii has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of anxiety and stress, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or cream, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential side effects.
